info.name: CodeBox - LeetCode Style Tests
info.description: Test code with multiple test cases like LeetCode

item.name: Problem 1: Sum of Two Numbers
item.description:
Given two integers, return their sum.

Input: Two integers on separate lines
Output: Sum of the two integers

item.name: Problem 2: FizzBuzz
item.description:
Given a number N, print numbers from 1 to N.
For multiples of 3 print 'Fizz', for multiples of 5 print 'Buzz',
for multiples of both print 'FizzBuzz'.

item.name: Problem 3: Factorial
item.description: Given a non-negative integer N, return N! (factorial).

item.name: Problem 4: Palindrome Check
item.description:
Given a string, check if it's a palindrome (reads same forwards and backwards).
Output 'true' or 'false'.

request.description: Replace tokens with actual tokens from batch submission response
